title: Missouri Revised Statutes § 57.520 - Expense paid out of city treasury
text:
57.520.  Expense paid out of city treasury. — All the necessary expenses incurred by the sheriff of the city of St. Louis in the conduct of the duties of his office, shall, upon his requisition, approved by the comptroller, be paid out of the treasury of the City of St. Louis.
(RSMo 1939 § 15677) 
Prior revision: 1929 § 14729
